notes: v1.0.0 baseline pinned for regression detection. evals/runner.py _load_baseline_scores() reads this on subsequent runs to flag rubric-score deltas. Sourced from the most recent clean synthetic run on prompt_version 2026-05-12.1; subsequent prompt revisions (2026-05-24.1 through 2026-05-24.4) ship with v1.0.0 but a re-baseline is recommended early in v1.0.1 once the streaming/split-analyze changes from PERF_ANALYZE.md land.
